full: Run the file, memory, child-process, and loopback-network tools, then stop at a safe point.
files: Create the deterministic artifact, append one mutation, then stop at a safe point.
memory: Allocate and fill the bounded deterministic memory buffer, then stop at a safe point.
child: Spawn the deterministic child process, record its result, then stop at a safe point.
network: Perform the loopback request against the in-process fixture, then stop at a safe point.
